body: `Pkg.develop(".")` does not update the registry, so if an updated version of a package is required but not in the registry this test would break. `instantiate` updates the registry, so we call that before `dev`ing now
title: Fix calibration test instantiation

body: The DYAMOND initial conditions did not set `Y.c.ρatke`, which was filled with NaNs.
title: Initialize tke to 0 for DYAMOND
